audit_result.proof_trace: ComputeCells returns len(cells) from external library without validating len(cells) == 128. Code then accesses cells[0..127] in loop without bounds check. Proof fails because contract depends on unverified assumption that c-kzg-4844 library always returns exactly CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB cells.
audit_result.attack_scenario: If external library has bug or version mismatch causing it to return fewer than 128 cells, code panics at cells[columnIndex] access (out-of-bounds), causing validator DoS.

PROP-57888860-post-003.text: compute_cells must produce exactly CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB cells from a valid blob.
